2606.16730.title: Attention is Just Another Name for Coupling?: A Fast-Slow ODE Perspective on Hierarchical Pretraining
2606.16730.paper_summary:
Causal self-attention is a coupling mechanism: each token's hidden state is updated by a learned mixture of preceding tokens at the same timescale. This paper asks whether a second, temporally slower coupling-a slow sub-system operating on a temporally-downsampled view of the sequence and fed back into the fast path through a zero-initialised gate-complements it. The question is framed in the language of singularly perturbed ordinary differential equations (ODEs), where the fast variable $x$ evolves at the token rate, the slow variable $y$ evolves at one update per $P$ tokens, and the timescale ratio $\varepsilon = 1/P$ is enforced structurally by causal block-mean pooling.
  The paper instantiates the fast-slow ODE formalism as a concrete neural network: a fast path of standard causal attention over $T$ tokens, a slow path of full attention over $T/P$ pooled tokens ($P^2 \times$ cheaper per layer), and a zero-initialised additive gate. In addition, under a linear-generator assumption on the fast dynamics, we prove that the equilibrium manifold $x = φ(y)$ is exactly the master-equation (ME) stationary distribution $p_{\mathrm{st}}(y)$; in that regime a learned MLP $φ_θ(y)$ is a variational approximation of it (the trained block is not a generator, so this identity is the structured limit, not a claim about the network as trained). Empirically, at $500$k tokens the coupling is neutral -- the gate stays closed and the coupled and frozen ablations are within run-to-run noise -- at a wall-clock cost comparable to a dense baseline. The contribution is the precise, gap-marked mapping itself, not a performance gain.
2606.16730.paper_summary_zh:
因果自注意力是一種耦合機制：每個標記的隱藏狀態是由學習到的前置標記的混合在相同時間尺度下進行更新。本文探討第二種時間上較慢的耦合——一個在時間下採樣的序列視圖上運行的慢子系統，並通過一個零初始化的閘門反饋到快速路徑中，是否能夠補充它。這個問題以單一擾動常微分方程（ODE）的語言來表述，其中快速變量 $x$ 以標記速率演變，慢變量 $y$ 每 $P$ 個標記更新一次，時間尺度比 $\varepsilon = 1/P$ 是通過因果區塊均值池結構性地強制執行的。  
本文將快慢 ODE 正式化為一個具體的神經網絡：一條在 $T$ 個標記上進行標準因果注意力的快速路徑，一條在 $T/P$ 個池化標記上進行全注意力的慢路徑（每層便宜 $P^2 \times$），以及一個零初始化的加法閘門。此外，在對快速動態的線性生成器假設下，我們證明了平衡流形 $x = φ(y)$ 正是主方程（ME）穩態分佈 $p_{\mathrm{st}}(y)$；在該範疇中，學習到的 MLP $φ_θ(y)$ 是其變分近似（訓練的區塊不是生成器，因此這一身份是結構限制，而不是關於訓練後網絡的聲明）。實證上，在 $500$k 標記時，耦合是中性的——閘門保持關閉，耦合和凍結的消融在運行到運行的噪聲範圍內——其時鐘成本與密集基線相當。貢獻是精確的、標記差距的映射本身，而不是性能增益。
2606.16730.author: Zhengyuan Gao et.al.
